reasoning_details.text:

Only translate title, subTitle, maybe cover_alt and cover_credit not present. Also language field not present; we need to add language: "Hindi"? The instruction: If a language field exists, set it exactly to "Hindi". It doesn't exist, so we don't need to add. Keep other metadata unchanged. We need to translate prose into Hindi, preserving headings, blockquotes, etc. Also need to prefix relative URLs with ../. The image URLs: ./hero-wide.webp etc. Should become ../hero-wide.webp? Actually relative URLs need prefix with ../. So change ./hero-wide.webp to ../hero-wide.webp. Same for other images: ./inline-url-diagram-dark.svg, ./hero-concept-8-drawers.webp. Also any relative link URLs: the link to Internet-Draft is absolute, keep. The link to "Internet-Draft for the `llm://` URI scheme" is absolute, keep. The link inside blockquote "Internet-Draft for the `llm://` URI scheme" is absolute, fine. Also there is a link inside blockquote:
The database world took decades to figure this out.
Good news, in AI timelines, that's only about half a vibe-year ago.
No link. Also there is a link in code comment: {/* ¹ Yes, I know that `URI` is more correct than `URL`. If you are pedantic enough to actually care about that distinction, please go touch grass. */} That's a comment, not a link. We need to preserve code blocks exactly. We need to translate headings: "## The Env Var Explosion", "### Anatomy of an LLM Connection String", etc. Also blockquote with class inset: translate its content. We need to keep inline code spans unchanged. We need to keep the MDX component tags unchanged; there are none besides blockquote. We need to keep the frontmatter block exactly, but translate title and subTitle. Title: "It's Time for llm:// Connection Strings" -> Hindi translation: "llm:// कनेक्शन स्ट्रिंग्स का समय आ गया है". Might keep the phrase "llm:// Connection Strings" maybe keep as is. So "It's Time for llm:// Connection Strings" => "llm:// कनेक्शन स्ट्रिंग्स का समय आ गया है". SubTitle: "Simplify Model & Provider Config with `llm://` URLs" => "मॉडल और प्रोवाइडर कॉन्फ़िग को `llm://` URLs से सरल बनाएं". We'll translate. Now go through content. First blockquote: "**Update:** This article led to an [Internet-Draft for the `llm://` URI scheme](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-levy-llm-uri-scheme/)." Translate "Update:" to "अद्यतन:" maybe. Keep link unchanged. So: "**अद्यतन:** This article led to an [Internet-Draft for the `llm://` URI scheme](...)." Then paragraph: "Remember the bad old days when connecting to a database meant juggling a miscellaneous grab-bag of environment variables?" Translate. We'll keep tone technical. Proceed. Also need to add ../ prefix to image URLs: The markdown image syntax: ![the parts of a LLM connection string](./inline-url-diagram-dark.svg) => ![LLM कनेक्शन स्ट्रिंग के भाग](../inline-url-diagram-dark.svg). Translate alt text. Similarly final image: ![a messy env var drawer](./hero-concept-8-drawers.webp) => alt translation. Also frontmatter cover images: cover_full_width: ./hero-wide.webp => should be ../hero-wide.webp. Same for cover_mobile and cover_icon. Now produce final output.
